name: オラッ掘人 ホレゆけ！ブラジル
slug: オラッ掘人-ホレゆけブラジル
short_description: A boring game like bowling that actually is not boring! Let’s go to Brazil from Japan!
detailed_description:
This is very simple action game.

Brazil is antipodal to Japan. You tunneled your way to Brazil from Japan!

・You can know the whole world!
The game has many countries as goals.
Let’s try to get all countries and secret places.


About the app informations
This app is fiction. Country name, capital name, photograph, these are creation that was built with its own interpretation of “Happymeal Inc.”
Please note that there is the case that is different from the fact these.
